# @construkt-kit/\* Shared Library

Monorepo providing `@construkt-kit/*` packages. Uses **pnpm workspaces**, **Turbo** (`pnpm turbo dev`), **Tsdown**, **Changesets**.

> For per-package details (exports, patterns, architecture), see `README.md` in each package under `packages/`.

## Packages

- **`@construkt-kit/ui`** ‚Äî 60+ UI components built on Panda CSS + Ark UI primitives. Always import from `@construkt-kit/ui`, never `@ark-ui/*` or `styled-system/*`.
- **`@construkt-kit/api`** ‚Äî HTTP client (`createApiClient`), typed error classes (`ApiError`, `ValidationError`, `NotFoundError`, `UnauthorizedError`), data-table types.
- **`@construkt-kit/utils`** ‚Äî Stateless utilities: arrays, dates, enums, numbers, objects, query strings, validation schemas (Zod).
- **`@construkt-kit/pages`** ‚Äî Shared auth pages (`LoginPage`, `ForgotPasswordPage`, `ResetPasswordPage`) with adapter-based auth.
- **`@construkt-kit/config`** ‚Äî Shared tool configs: `@construkt-kit/config/typescript`, `/vite`, `/oxlint`, `/oxfmt`, `/playwright`, `/kubb`.

## Key Dependencies

- React 19 (peer dep ‚Äî all packages specify `^19.0.0`)
- Panda CSS (build-time CSS-in-JS)
- Ark UI (headless component primitives)
- Zod (validation schemas in @construkt-kit/utils)
- Kubb (OpenAPI client codegen, configured via @construkt-kit/config/kubb)
- TanStack Table (used by DataTable)
- MSW (mock service worker, for Storybook/testing)

## Conventions

- Named exports only (no default exports)
- Source under `packages/<name>/src/`, each with `tsconfig.json` + `tsdown.config.ts`
- Consumed via path aliases (e.g., `@construkt-kit/ui` ‚Üí `packages/ui/src`)

## Build & Dev Commands

| Command          | Purpose                             |
| ---------------- | ----------------------------------- |
| `pnpm install`   | Install all workspace dependencies  |
| `pnpm dev`       | Dev mode (watch + rebuild all pkgs) |
| `pnpm build`     | Build all packages (`dist/`)        |
| `pnpm test`      | Run all tests                       |
| `pnpm typecheck` | Type-check all packages             |
| `pnpm lint`      | Lint all packages (oxlint)          |
| `pnpm format`    | Format all packages (oxfmt)         |
| `pnpm storybook` | Start Storybook dev server          |
| `pnpm changeset` | Create a changeset for versioning   |

All build/dev/test/lint/typecheck commands go through Turbo (`turbo run <task>` via root scripts).

Build tool: **tsdown** (`tsdown.config.ts` in each package). Output: ESM + CJS + `.d.ts` in `dist/`.
`styled-system/` directories are Panda CSS generated output (committed, not in dist). **Never edit `styled-system/` manually** ‚Äî regenerated by `panda codegen`.

## Versioning (Changesets)

1. `pnpm changeset` ‚Äî describe what changed and which packages are affected
2. `pnpm changeset version` ‚Äî bump versions and update changelogs
3. Commit the version bump, then `pnpm changeset publish` to publish

## Testing

- **Unit tests**: Vitest (configured per-package via `vitest.config.ts`)
- **E2E tests**: Playwright (configured via `@construkt-kit/config/playwright`)
- **Mocking**: MSW (mock service worker) for Storybook and test suites

## Linting

- Root `oxlint.config.ts` extends `@construkt-kit/config/oxlint` with type-aware checking enabled.
- `@construkt-kit/ui` has an additional `oxlint.config.ts` that loads `@pandacss/eslint-plugin` ‚Äî enforces `no-hardcoded-color`, `no-invalid-token-paths`, etc.
- Run `pnpm lint` to check all packages. Per-package scripts use `oxlint src` or `oxlint .`, relying on local or root `oxlint.config.ts` resolution.

## Anti-Patterns (Do NOT)

- Import from `@ark-ui/react` directly ‚Äî always use the `@construkt-kit/ui` wrapper
- Import from `styled-system/*` in consuming apps ‚Äî use `css`/`styled`/`token` from `@construkt-kit/ui`
- Use hardcoded colors (`#hex`, `rgb()`, `hsl()`) ‚Äî use Panda tokens
- Use default exports ‚Äî all packages use named exports only
- Import between packages via relative paths ‚Äî use `@construkt-kit/*` aliases
- Add `react` or `react-dom` to package `dependencies` ‚Äî they are peer deps

## Package Dependency Graph

```
@construkt-kit/config         ‚Üê all packages (tool configs)
@construkt-kit/utils          ‚Üê @construkt-kit/api, @construkt-kit/ui, @construkt-kit/pages, consuming apps
@construkt-kit/ui             ‚Üê @construkt-kit/pages, consuming apps  (depends on @construkt-kit/utils)
@construkt-kit/pages          ‚Üê consuming apps  (defines AuthProvider interface, depends on @construkt-kit/ui)
@construkt-kit/api            ‚Üê consuming apps  (HTTP client factory, uses @kubb/plugin-client)
```

## Design Principles

- **Adapter pattern** ‚Äî auth pages accept interfaces, not specific SDKs
- **Callback-driven** ‚Äî pages/components use callbacks for navigation, never import a router
- **Factory functions** ‚Äî configs export `createXConfig()`, API exports `createApiClient()`
- **Stateless utilities** ‚Äî `@construkt-kit/utils` has no framework deps, no side effects

## Common Workflows

| Task                  | Files to touch                                                                          |
| --------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| New UI component      | `packages/ui/src/components/Name/Name.tsx`, `.stories.tsx`, `index.ts` + barrel exports |
| New utility function  | `packages/utils/src/<domain>.ts` + re-export from `index.ts`                            |
| New API error class   | `packages/api/src/errors.ts` + re-export from `index.ts`                                |
| New shared config     | `packages/config/<tool>/index.ts` + add sub-path in `package.json` exports              |
| Add a Storybook story | `packages/ui/src/components/Name/Name.stories.tsx`                                      |
| Version bump          | `pnpm changeset` ‚Üí `pnpm changeset version` ‚Üí commit                                    |

## File Naming Conventions

- Component folders: `PascalCase` matching export name
- Story files: `ComponentName.stories.tsx`
- Utility files: `kebab-case` domain name (e.g., `array.ts`, `date.ts`)
- Config files: `index.ts` or `index.json` under the tool subfolder
- All barrel exports: `index.ts`
